title: ESIC Varanasi – Teaching Faculty, Senior Residents – 45 Posts

basic_details.job_title: ESIC Varanasi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 45 Teaching Faculty, Senior Resident Posts
basic_details.short_information: ESIC Medical College Varanasi (ESIC Varanasi) Recruitment 2026 for 45 posts of Teaching Faculty. Candidates with MD/MS Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 27-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through ESIC Varanasi official website esic.gov.in.

qualification.education_qualification: MD/MS in the concerned Subject as per NMC norms

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ESIC Varanasi Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
